loop1.title: PQ Issues KPI Strip (Total Issues / I-THD Events / V-THD Events / PF Gap Feeders / Neutral Stress / Worst I-THD / Worst V-THD)
loop1.note: Showing I-THD, V-THD, PF Gap, and Neutral Stress counts for the panel's outgoing feeders; V-THD and specific harmonic order (h5/h7) data is unavailable for some members, so those metrics are approximate or blank where data is missing.

loop1.title: Harmonics & PQ Timeline
loop1.note: Showing per-panel THD and event breach counts via roster; limit lines are blank because this asset's nameplate rating is unknown.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: nothing could be bound for this card on this asset — every data leaf renders an honest blank (per-leaf reasons attached), not a zero

loop1.title: Feeder PQ At {period}
loop1.note: Showing per-feeder THD and power quality metrics for the last 7 days; some feeders (Axial Fan Panel-2, Curing Line CSU-01, Fire Fighting System, Domestic Water Pump) are dark and omitted from the roster.

loop1.title: Signature
loop1.note: Showing current THD (I-THD) and power (kW) — voltage THD (V-THD) and specific harmonic orders (H3, H5, H7) are not measured for this asset.
